title: Apple and Google ordered by San Francisco attorney to take action against 'nudify' apps - Engadget
summary: Both companies were sent cease-and-desist letters regarding 13 apps on their respective stores. Apple and Google have been sent cease-and-desist letters that demand they remove AI-powered "nudify" apps from their respective app stores.
caption: output/2026-07-17/apple-and-google-ordered-by-san-francisco-attorney-to-take-action-agai.txt
